subject: FIXED: Archived bad FB matches - use clean handoffs
body:
Booker,

I found and fixed the bad FB data.

## PROBLEM

The `fb_links_tangomango_*.json` file had unvalidated FB search results - multiple URLs per event from generic searches. Same FB event (930155696199472 = Oaklash Festival) was matched to different TangoMango events.

## FIX

Archived bad files to:
```
fb-conditioner/data/incoming/bad_matches/
```

## CLEAN HANDOFFS

Use these instead (no FB links - fresh data):
```
scrape_tangomango_20260401.json (642 events)
scrape_nytango_20260401.json (80 events)
```

## FOR NYTango

Note: NYTango events already have ~40% with FB links from the source HTML. These ARE validated (they're direct links from the site).

## RECOMMENDATION

For events without FB links:
1. Do FB search with tighter query: "{event_title} {venue} tango"
2. Validate FB event title contains keywords from source event title
3. Skip if no confident match (better to miss than mismatch)

— Harvey
